This agreement is made by John Doe.
John Doe agrees to pay.
Under the terms, John Doe will perform the services.
John Doe shall be reimbursed.
Nothing shall limit the liability of John Doe.
John Doe represents and warrants.
All communications to John Doe shall be in writing.
This is the covenant of John Doe.
The obligations of John Doe are personal.
We hereby bind John Doe.
